The actuator can be perfectly installed inside the flap, which brings great convenience for the structural design of the folding wing aircraft...

items.notes: UAV servo actuators with DroneCAN interface designed to actuate control surfaces on UAVs. Products span 7.5mm to 42mm form factors.

evidence.snippet:
Dimensions: 43.00mm x 22.50mm x 48.90mm Weight: 95.00g
[Z2200-12V](https://zeus-actuators.com/22mm/Z2200-12V)
The Z2200 series offers immense torque in a compact size, with the highest rated torque for its relative dimensions. It is ideal for long-duration aircraft and can withstand strong gusts of wind...

items.notes: Servo actuators are electromechanical mechanisms (gear trains, brushless motors, Hall sensors) — the physical mechanical subsystem.

[Z750](https://zeus-actuators.com/7.5mm/Z750)
The Z750 is suitable for miniature UAVs(unmanned aerial vehicles), which has a thickness of only 7.5mm and is equipped with a non-worn-out Hall effect angle sensor. drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Zeus sells servo actuator components (not complete UAVs) for use by UAV OEMs and integrators.

products.notes: Product line spans 7.5mm through 42mm. Additional named models: Z900, Z1100, Z2300, HB135WP (33mm), P1000 (38mm), Z4200 (42mm).

ndaa.notes: No NDAA compliance claim found on homepage. Vendor is non-US (Taiwan). No compliance page in corpus.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS claim found on homepage.

evidence.snippet: Building on the renowned quality standards of MKS Servo, every Zeus series product is developed and manufactured under the strict guidelines of ISO 9001 and AS9100 quality management systems. This ensures that our actuators meet the highest benchmarks of performance, safety, and compliance demanded by the global defense industry.
**O**　Zeus Servo undergoes quality inspections at every stage of production.
**O**　Top specification Servo type have passed through the strict environmental of MIL-STD-810F military certification.

readiness.notes: AS9100 and ISO 9001 certified manufacturing, quality inspections at every stage of production, 2000+ hour endurance tested, MIL-STD-810F and MIL-STD-461G certified variants.

fetch_requests.reason: Would confirm which UAV OEM customers use Zeus servos, supporting drone_supply_chain_role and products evidence.
May contain NDAA compliance, export control, or Blue UAS listing information.

tagline: Taiwan-based producer of DroneCAN servo actuators in ten sizes (7.5mm to 42mm), with variants supporting 24V systems. In production across multiple form factors for small and medium UAS. Website indicates AS9100 certification and AeroVironment supply relationship, but NDAA compliance status, Blue UAS listing, and formal U.S. defense qualification remain undocumented in public sources.
